info.title: Stable Sea Terminal API
info.description: A comprehensive API for managing terminal operations, organizations, quotes, and orders in the Stable Sea shipping platform

get.description: Returns all available liquidity providers with their trading pairs and hours of operation

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
import "github.com/stablesea/sdk-go"

client := sdk.NewClient(os.Getenv("STABLESEA_API_KEY"), "")
providers, err := client.ListLiquidityProviders(ctx)

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
providers = client.liquidity_providers.list()

get.description: Get current exchange rate for a specific liquidity provider

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
import "github.com/stablesea/sdk-go"

client := sdk.NewClient(os.Getenv("STABLESEA_API_KEY"), "")
rate, err := client.GetExchangeRate(ctx, "ALPHA")

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
rate = client.liquidity_providers.get_exchange_rate("ALPHA")

post.description: Create a new API key. The raw key is returned once and must be stored securely.

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
key = client.api_keys.create(name="My Key", environment="SANDBOX", permission_level="STANDARD")

get.description: List all API keys for the authenticated enterprise (masked)

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
import "github.com/stablesea/sdk-go"

client := sdk.NewClient(os.Getenv("STABLESEA_API_KEY"), "")
keys, err := client.ListApiKeys(ctx)

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
keys = client.api_keys.list()

post.description: Rotate an API key. The current key is revoked and a new key is returned once.

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
import "github.com/stablesea/sdk-go"

client := sdk.NewClient(os.Getenv("STABLESEA_API_KEY"), "")
key, err := client.RotateApiKey(ctx, "apkey_01k4r01nm4f41tcsws4sr9k8nn")

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
key = client.api_keys.rotate("apkey_01k4r01nm4f41tcsws4sr9k8nn")

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
import "github.com/stablesea/sdk-go"

client := sdk.NewClient(os.Getenv("STABLESEA_API_KEY"), "")
err := client.RevokeApiKey(ctx, "apkey_01k4r01nm4f41tcsws4sr9k8nn")

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
client.api_keys.revoke("apkey_01k4r01nm4f41tcsws4sr9k8nn")

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
org = client.organizations.create(
  name="Acme Inc",
  contact={"email": "admin@acme.com", "first_name": "Jane", "last_name": "Doe"},
  idempotency_key="unique-idempotency-key"
)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
import "github.com/stablesea/sdk-go"

client := sdk.NewClient(os.Getenv("STABLESEA_API_KEY"), "")
orgs, err := client.ListOrganizations(ctx)

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
orgs = client.organizations.list()

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific organization

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
import "github.com/stablesea/sdk-go"

client := sdk.NewClient(os.Getenv("STABLESEA_API_KEY"), "")
org, err := client.GetOrganization(ctx, "org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy")

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
org = client.organizations.get("org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy")

post.description: Creates an external account for an organization to receive payouts

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
epi = client.external_payment_instruments.create(
  organization_id="org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy",
  alias="My Bank",
  currency="COP",
  method="COP_BANK_ACCOUNT",
  details={"account_number": "123", "account_type": "CHECKING"},
  idempotency_key="unique-key"
)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations

get.description: Fetch all external payment instruments for a customer

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
epis = client.external_payment_instruments.list("org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy")

get.description: Fetch a specific external payment instrument for an organization

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
epi = client.external_payment_instruments.get(
  "org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy",
  "mnyacctcm_01k4r01nm4f41tcsws4sr9k8nn"
)

delete.description: Archive an external account for a customer

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
client.external_payment_instruments.archive(
  "org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy",
  "mnyacctcm_01k4r01nm4f41tcsws4sr9k8nn"
)

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
offerings = client.offerings.create(
  organization_id="org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy",
  idempotency_key="unique-key"
)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific offering

x-codeSamples.label: Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:

  "org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy",
  "off_01k4qph5ezfsga7fkvbygsqq93"

post.description: Creates a quote for an organization

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
Go SDK
Python SDK
x-codeSamples.source:
from stablesea import StableseaClient

client = StableseaClient(api_key=os.environ["STABLESEA_API_KEY"])
quote = client.quotes.create(
  organization_id="org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy",
  offering_id="off_01k4qph5ezfsga7fkvbygsqq93",
  payin_amount="100",
  idempotency_key="unique-idempotency-key"
)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate operations

quote, err := client.GetQuote(ctx, "org_01k2cm4r59e5z8k5ggrbbxjcwy", "qt_01k4qpmvgxfsg9db9mjrtq9tk2")

x-codeSamples.source:

exchange_rate.description: Current exchange rate as a string to preserve precision

DecimalString.description: A string representation of a decimal number

masked_key.description: Masked key for display, e.g. sk_...xyz

api_key.description: Raw API key - only returned once on creation or rotation

bearerAuth.description: Enter your sandbox API key to try requests. Use only sandbox keys here—never production keys.
